label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are more than 5 years old and weigh more than 12 kg. Gwen, 8, 70, 15 So, for each penguin, I need to check two conditions: age > 5 and weight > 12 kg. Starting with Louis. His age is 7, which is more than 5. But his weight is 11 kg, which is not more than 12. So Louis doesn't qualify. Next is Bernard. His age is 5. Wait, the condition is more than 5 years old. So 5 is not more than 5. So even though his weight is 13 kg (which is more than 12), Bernard doesn't meet the age condition. So he's out. Then Vincent. Age is 9, which is more than 5. His weight is 11 kg. Again, weight is under 12, so he doesn't qualify either. Finally, Gwen. Her age is 8 (more than 5) and her weight is 15 kg (which is more than 12). So Gwen meets both conditions. Wait, so only Gwen meets both? Let me check again. Louis: age 7 (>5), weight 11 (not >12) → no Bernard: age 5 (not >5), weight 13 → no Vincent: age 9 (>5), weight 11 → no Gwen: age 8 (>5), weight 15 → yes So only one penguin, Gwen, meets both criteria. Same as Louis. Age is good, weight not. Gwen: 8 years, 15 kg. Both conditions met. So only Gwen. Therefore the answer should be 1, which is option A. Wait, but let me check again. Maybe I miscounted.
